Bash(sshpass -p 'C1c0relusM@ximus' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -o ConnectTimeout=10 -p 2222 pi@localhost 'echo "=== LISTENING PORTS ==="; ss -ltnp 2>&1; echo "=== GATEWAY HTTP ==="; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}" http://127.0.0.1:18810/ 2>&1 || echo "connection refused"; echo; echo "=== MATRIX VERSIONS ==="; curl -s http://127.0.0.1:18810/_matrix/client/versions 2>&1 || echo "no response"; echo; echo "=== CINNY CONFIG ==="; curl -s http://127.0.0.1:18810/config.json 2>&1 || echo "no response"; echo; echo "=== MATRIX DIRECT ==="; curl -s http://127.0.0.1:6167/_matrix/client/versions 2>&1 || echo "no response on 6167"' 2>/dev/null)

Bash(sshpass -p 'C1c0relusM@ximus' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -o ConnectTimeout=10 -p 2222 pi@localhost 'echo "=== PI-DAEMON LOGS ==="; journalctl --user -u pi-daemon -n 40 --no-pager 2>&1; echo "=== DUFS HEALTHCHECK ==="; cat ~/.config/containers/systemd/bloom-dufs.container 2>&1; echo "=== DUFS INSPECT HEALTH ==="; podman inspect bloom-dufs --format "{{.State.Health}}" 2>&1 || true' 2>/dev/null)

Bash(sshpass -p 'C1c0relusM@ximus' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -o ConnectTimeout=10 -p 2222 pi@localhost 'journalctl --user -u pi-daemon -n 40 --no-pager' 2>/dev/null)
